1x1.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the left and top edges.

1x2.description: A tee-shaped cable with exits to the left, right, and bottom edges.

1x3.description: A straight horizontal cable connects the left and right edges.

2x1.description: A vertical straight cable connecting the top and bottom edges.

2x2.description: A cable in a tee shape exits top, bottom, and right edges.

2x3.description: A T-shaped cable exits left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: A tee-shaped cable connecting left, right, and top edges.

3x2.description: An elbow-shaped cable exits through the left and bottom edges.

3x3.description: An elbow-shaped cable connects the top and right edges.
